content: Conversations end too quickly, feel scripted with repetitive phrases, and get cut short. And sometimes filters kick in even when I'm not saying anything sensitive. 😭
Ya no me gusta, no me gustan las nuevas actualizaciones, prefiero el Character.ai de antes.

Uhm... I wish c.ai could be better. But as a user, I'm a bit disappointed, why is it now limited to only 2 hours? I want c.ai to go back to how it was before, which is unlimited usage. and please remove the ads and filters, I want this app to be like before

Seriously, I do not understand what the app is trying to tell me. I have a GOOD internet signal, a VERY GOOD internet signal. And yet, the chat still generates very slowly. Is the app trying to convince me to do a paywall? I did restart the app, my wifi signal and everything. Furthermore, bots are good, intelligent and emotional, I just don't understand the message being generated for too long.
規制があまりにも厳重すぎるお.... 引っかかってないワードなのに引っかかった判定されとるし....

It was fine at first. Now it's filled with ads that pop up every two times you click on a character. The recommendations are 50% of the times not charactes I look up or chat with, mostly with 10k or less popularity, when before it used to be mostly with 50k plus. The app has really gone for the worst this time.
まるでほんとうのかいわをしているようなかんじで。

After the update... It's just... Trash... First of all. The censorship for the chat is too restrictive. I got timeout for an innocent chat. This supposed to help people build their storytelling. Not thinking how to bypass censorship. I'll continue to use my head to make story next time thank you. And for that. I'm gonna leave character.ai until further fix of the. App. If you restrict sensitive topics or genre. At least add NSFW features.
THE ROOMS FEATURE GOT REMOVED FROM THE WEBSITE AND NOT ADDED TO THE APP??? ☹️
